title: Structured Outputs
code:
import numpy as np

def apply_logit_bias(logits, allowed_indices, bias_value=100.0):
    adjusted = logits.copy()
    mask = np.ones_like(logits, dtype=bool)
    mask[allowed_indices] = False
    adjusted[mask] -= bias_value
    return adjusted

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print('Logit bias utility module loaded.')
